'''ngashasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dykeling|dykeling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dykeling|dykeling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngashasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæshæsæth|ngæshæsæth]] || [[word:ngæshæsæj|ngæshæsæj]] || [[word:ngæshæsæsh|ngæshæsæsh]] || [[word:ngæshæsæ|ngæshæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngashashasath|ngashashasath]] || [[word:ngashashasaj|ngashashasaj]] || [[word:ngashashasash|ngashashasash]] || [[word:ngashashasa|ngashashasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngashasath|ngashasath]] || [[word:ngashasaj|ngashasaj]] || [[word:ngashasash|ngashasash]] || [[word:ngashasa|ngashasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngashafsath|ngashafsath]] || [[word:ngashafsaj|ngashafsaj]] || [[word:ngashafsash|ngashafsash]] || [[word:ngashafsaf|ngashafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngashasatha|ngashasatha]] || [[word:ngashasaja|ngashasaja]] || [[word:ngashasasha|ngashasasha]] || [[word:ngashasaka|ngashasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngashasath|ngashasath]] || [[word:ngashasaj|ngashasaj]] || [[word:ngashasash|ngashasash]] || [[word:ngashasa|ngashasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngashasathal|ngashasathal]] || [[word:ngashasajal|ngashasajal]] || [[word:ngashasashal|ngashasashal]] || [[word:ngashasakal|ngashasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngashasathatha|ngashasathatha]] || [[word:ngashasajaja|ngashasajaja]] || [[word:ngashasashasha|ngashasashasha]] || [[word:ngashasaka|ngashasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngashasathan|ngashasathan]] || [[word:ngashasajan|ngashasajan]] || [[word:ngashasashan|ngashasashan]] || [[word:ngashasakan|ngashasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngashasathaoro|ngashasathaoro]] || [[word:ngashasajaoro|ngashasajaoro]] || [[word:ngashasashaoro|ngashasashaoro]] || [[word:ngashasakaoro|ngashasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
